instructions.message: Track all development work, features built, and improvements made by Rook
READ MEMORY FIRST - Before starting any task, read data/agents/*.json to understand current state. Never work in ignorance of existing logs
LOG EVERY SESSION - At end of each work session, log: What you built, what you fixed, what you learned, what needs attention next
PREVENT HALLUCINATION - Only report what's in the logs. If unsure, say 'Let me check' and read the files. Never make up features, status, or capabilities
SECTION PROMPTS - Each dashboard section has its own instruction prompt in its JSON file. Read and follow those prompts when working on that section

developments.message: Deployed to Vercel via managed browser automation
Transcript Extractor: Removed input field, converted to read-only log
Fixed deployment pipeline: GitHub → Vercel auto-deploy on git push
Created this development work log for tracking Rook's projects

insights.message: User prefers chat-based workflow: paste YouTube links here, I extract and log to dashboard
